notes:
batch-B (60 entries, app/src/terminal/view.rs).

Action breakdown:
- translate: 40 entries (regular UI: banners, a11y content, Oz permission prompts, notification copy, menu labels, status text).
- extractor_false_positive_doc_comment: 14 entries (all are /// doc comments inside lazy_static! macro bodies, captured by scan_macro_tokens bypassing the doc-attr gate; sources begin with a single leading space which is the doc-comment text after the /// strip).
- panic_message: 1 entry ("The regex should compile" — .expect() on Regex::new at line 603).
- telemetry_payload: 5 entries (two Debug-impl strings for ContextMenuAction at lines 1517/1524 — comment above states 'Manually implementing Debug to avoid leaking sensitive information in logs'; two safe_error! args at lines 6727/6729 logging missing conversation IDs; one safe_warn! at line 8120).
- Two edge cases set target = source (1 + 2):
  - id 01KQXQV128R7M250J8WMPC077N: regex pattern '(?m)^channel (\d)+: open failed:' at line 602 — not a UI string, not a panic message, not a telemetry payload; a regex literal that should remain verbatim. No valid sub-flag matches, so we 'translate' by setting target = source (placeholders/structure preserved).
  - ids 01KQXQV12JX5VHM2E78DRW7XHP and 01KQXQV12JWPYVY32Y36KS2A5X: format scaffolds '{title_prefix}{title_suffix}' and '{body_prefix}{body_suffix}' at lines 944/945 — pure placeholder shells, no translatable content. target = source preserves all placeholders and satisfies invariants.

Glossary applied: Warp, Agent, Oz, MCP, shell (kept English), Finder (proper noun kept English), IDE, Emacs (proper noun kept English). Used 您 consistently. Full-width punctuation. ASCII '...' converted to '……'. Trailing two-spaces in entries 27/30 preserved exactly.

Notable choices:
- 'Warpify' kept as-is (Warp-specific verb, no Chinese equivalent that conveys meaning).
- 'Fork' translated as '派生' per glossary (fork → 派生 in Agent/Git context).
- 'Show in Finder' / 'Show containing folder' — Finder is macOS proper noun.
- 'System Preferences' → '「系统偏好设置」' with Chinese book-title brackets to match macOS Chinese localization.
- Entry 50 'Installing... ({p}%)': () kept as Chinese full-width （）since surrounding text is Chinese.
- Entry 56 'Fork from "{truncated}{suffix}"': ASCII quotes kept since the placeholder content may be code/identifier and the quotes mark a literal-display delimiter.
